category_sources: source_facts.description says svg2pdf renders SVG images to a PDF file using Cairo.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is svg2pdf and source_facts.source-archive is the Cairo svg2pdf release archive.
docs_sources: Official source tree contains the svg2pdf manual page; Cairo snapshots page is the official release surface referenced by source_facts.source-archive.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; Cairo release archive and freedesktop cgit identify the historical official svg2pdf source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SVG-to-PDF rendering using Cairo.
